name: ExtensionConceptMap_Group_Element_NoMap
title: R5: No mapping to a target concept for this source concept additional types
description: R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` additional types (boolean) additional types from child elements (value)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` 0..1 `boolean`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` 0..1 `boolean`
*  R4B: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.equivalence` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.equivalence` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.equivalence` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` do not cover the following types: boolean.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.

element.short: R5: No mapping to a target concept for this source concept additional types
element.definition: R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` additional types (boolean) additional types from child elements (value)
element.comment:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.equivalence` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` do not cover the following types: boolean.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.noMap` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.
If noMap = true, then the behavior of ConceptMap.group.unmapped (if present) does not apply.

element.short: No mapping to a target concept for this source concept
element.definition: If noMap = true this indicates that no mapping to a target concept exists for this source concept.
element.comment: If noMap = true, then the behavior of ConceptMap.group.unmapped (if present) does not apply.
